tags_v2.action: dispensing molten wax from melter tap into pot

seconds_v2.desc: A black wax-melter pot with a metal spigot stands on a cloth-covered counter, its tap positioned over an empty aluminum pouring pot resting on a digital scale
The melter and its closed spigot sit ready above the aluminum pot on the scale, no wax flowing yet
Static view of the wax melter's tap over the empty aluminum pouring pitcher on the kitchen scale
The setup holds steady, melter spigot still closed above the waiting aluminum pot
A gloved hand begins to reach toward the spigot lever of the black wax melter
A black-gloved hand grips the spigot handle to open the tap of the wax melter
The gloved hand turns the valve, the spigot starting to release wax over the aluminum pot
Clear molten wax streams from the spigot down into the aluminum pouring pot on the scale
A steady stream of liquid wax pours from the melter tap into the aluminum pot being weighed on the digital scale

windows.embed_text_v2: stirring amber molten wax in aluminum pot then pouring it into rows of white silicone moulds with metal wick-centering bars, filling pillar candle moulds, finished tan pumpkin candles nearby on granite counter
windows.summary_v2: Amber molten wax is stirred in an aluminum pot, then poured into a row of wick-centered silicone moulds on the counter.

tags_v2.action: stirring then pouring molten wax into moulds

seconds_v2.desc: A black-gloved hand stirs amber molten wax with a metal spatula inside a large aluminum pouring pot on a granite counter, a wick-centered mould visible behind
The gloved hand continues swirling the spatula through the honey-colored liquid wax in the aluminum pot
Scene cuts to pouring molten wax from the aluminum pot into rows of moulds; tan-colored finished pillar candles and a pink mould sit on the counter, white moulds with wick bars lined up at right
A thin stream of wax is poured into one of the white silicone moulds held by metal wick-centering bars on a black mat
Wax continues filling a mould cavity, the centered wick held taut by a slotted metal bar across the top
The pot pours molten wax into the next mould in the row, amber wax pooling in the white silicone form
More wax is poured along the line of wicked moulds, several already partly filled with golden wax
The aluminum pot tips wax into another mould, the wick bar steadying the wick as the cavity fills
Final frame shows wax streaming into a mould near the front of the row, filled tan pillar candles in pumpkin-shaped moulds resting to the left

windows.old_description: Demoulding/trimming the ribbed & bubble pillar candles.
windows.embed_text_v2: Pouring molten wax from stainless pitcher to top off cream tan molded pillar candles, wicks pinned by metal clothespin clips, pink silicone mold and grey ribbed molds on granite counter, gloved hand
windows.summary_v2: A black-gloved hand uses a stainless pouring pitcher to top off molded tan pillar candles whose wicks are held upright by metal clips on a granite counter.

tags_v2.action: pouring wax to top off molded pillar candles
tags_v2.setting: home kitchen with granite counter and white tile backsplash

seconds_v2.desc: Overhead view of a granite counter holding several cream/tan molded pillar candles whose wicks are pinned upright by metal clothespin-style clips laid across each mold opening; a pink silicone mold and a row of grey/white molded shapes sit alongside, and a stainless pouring pitcher tip hovers top-right dribbling a thin string of wax.

Near-identical scene; the tan cube and floral molded candles rest under their wick-holding metal clips, pink silicone mold center, grey ribbed molds at right, as the steel pitcher nozzle stays poised at top-right with a fine wax thread hanging from it.

Static shot of the curing/molding setup: tan beeswax-colored molded candles with clipped wicks, pink silicone mold, and grey-and-white molded pieces on the granite, pouring pitcher tip idle at upper right.
Same arrangement of clipped, filled candle molds on the counter; the metal pitcher has shifted slightly toward the back tan mold, a thin wax drip extending from its spout.
The stainless pitcher moves over the rear cream-colored mold; a black-gloved hand begins to enter frame top-right as wax starts to be directed into the back candle.

A black-gloved hand now grips the stainless pouring pitcher and tips it over the back-right tan mold, pouring molten wax to top it off; foreground tan and pink molds with clipped wicks remain on the granite.
Continued pour: gloved hand holds the steel pitcher above the rear mold, wax filling the opening; the other clipped tan and pink molds and grey ribbed molds sit waiting in the foreground.
Pour ongoing into the back cream mold from the gloved-hand-held pitcher; molten wax pooling at the mold's top surface, surrounding molds steady under their wick clips.

Final frame: gloved hand still tilting the stainless pitcher over the back tan mold finishing the top-off pour, foreground filled molds with clothespin wick holders and the pink silicone mold unchanged on the granite counter.

windows.embed_text_v2: Molded pillar candles curing and cooling on granite counter, two ribbed fluted cream pillars in clear cylindrical molds, tan bubble-cluster molded candles, wicks pinned upright by metal clips, setting wax
windows.summary_v2: A slow pan across a granite counter shows freshly molded cream fluted pillar candles in clear molds and tan textured molded candles cooling and curing, wicks held upright by metal clips.

tags_v2.action: showing molded candles cooling and curing
tags_v2.setting: home kitchen with granite counter and white subway tile

seconds_v2.desc: Granite counter against white subway tile holds two tall cream-colored ribbed/fluted pillar candles set in clear cylindrical molds, each with its wick pinned across the top by a metal clip; at lower left a knobby bubble-textured tan molded candle with a clip-held wick sits curing.

Camera pans slightly left; the two fluted cream pillars in clear molds remain center-right, wicks held by metal clips, while more tan bubble-cluster molded candles and a stray wick come into view in the foreground, all cooling on the counter.

View shifts further; foreground now shows the glossy tan bubble-knot molded candle and a pink silicone mold edge bottom-left, the shorter and taller ribbed cream pillars still curing in their clear molds behind.

Continued pan across the setting candles: tan knobby molded candle at left with clip-held wick, two clear-molded fluted cream pillars center and right, white tile and granite throughout; nothing being actively poured.
Closer framing on the two cream fluted pillars in clear cylindrical molds with metal wick clips, surfaces slightly glossy from cooling wax; tan bubble candle partly visible lower left.
Camera holds on the pair of ribbed cream pillar candles curing in clear molds, wicks clipped upright; foreground tan molded candle and metal clip at left edge.
Slight pan continues; the shorter fluted pillar (left) and taller fluted pillar (right) sit in their clear molds, tan knobby candles and clips occupying the lower-left foreground as the wax sets.
Two cream fluted pillar candles remain center-right in clear molds with clipped wicks; in front, tan bubble-cluster molded candles and a round disc-shaped tan candle appear bottom-right, all cooling.

Final frame: closer low-angle on the curing candles, tan bubble-knot molded candle and a smooth oval tan candle in the foreground, the two ribbed cream pillars in clear molds with metal wick clips behind, all setting on the granite.
